chapter_title.en: Chapter 52 – The supplication at the end of the Salāt

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/367)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/367)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ جَاءَ جَبْرَئِيلُ ( عليه السلام ) إِلَى يُوسُفَ وَ هُوَ فِي السِّجْنِ فَقَالَ لَهُ يَا يُوسُفُ قُلْ فِي دُبُرِ كُلِّ صَلَاةٍ.
اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ لِي فَرَجاً وَ مَخْرَجاً وَ ارْزُقْنِي مِنْ حَيْثُ أَحْتَسِبُ وَ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا أَحْتَسِبُ

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad Bin Usman, from Sayf Bin Ameyra who said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullahasws saying: ‘Jibraeelas came over to Yusufas while heas was in the prison, and heas said to himas: ‘O Yusufas! Say at the end of every Salāt:

‘O Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>! Make a relief for me<sup style="font-weight: normal">as</sup> and an exit, and Grace me<sup style="font-weight: normal">as</sup> from where I<sup style="font-weight: normal">as</sup> do expect and from where I<sup style="font-weight: normal">as</sup> do not expect (it to be from)’’.
en.sarwar: 7. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hammad ibn ‘Uthman from Sayf ibn ‘Amirah who has said the following: “I heard abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) saying, ‘Jibril (Gabriel) came to Joseph in prison and said to him, “Joseph, after every prayer say, ‘O Lord, grant me relief, a way out (of difficulties), and sustenance from the sources I expect and from those I do not expect.’”
